title: Golden Hour Couple
prompt: Ultra-realistic 4K cinematic romantic couple portrait, young South Asian couple sitting in a golden wheat field at sunset. The man in a black shirt hugs the woman lovingly, leaning close to her face. The woman wears a red embroidered traditional outfit with jewelry, eyes closed with a soft smile. Warm golden sunlight, dreamy background blur, natural expressions, romantic mood, DSLR photography, shallow depth of field.
